text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of her debut, Mejiro Palmer decides
to make herself look as much like a party girl as
possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, seeing the fans who have supported the
Mejiro family for years at the venue, she becomes
intimidated and the race turns awkward.
